commands.review_summary:
The PR removes preview-text-based final payload suppression and updates reply payload tests so matching final blocks are delivered after a partial preview.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main captures the latest partial preview and suppresses matching final payloads, and the existing e2e test asserts that `run()` returns `undefined`. I did not run tests because this review was read-only and local tests can write artifacts.
